LAW AND MOTION, 301, PLAINTIFF BRUCE MADDOX'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS DENIED EVEN ASSUMING THE ADDENDUM'S PROPERTY IN EVIDENCE AND IS PART OF THE LEASE. IT DOES NOT PROVIDE FOR ACCESS TO THE GARBAGE AREA. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO DEMONSTRATE A LIKELIHOOD OF OBTAINING THE REQUESTED RELIEF AND PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN IRREPARABLE INJURY OR THE INADEQUACY OF A LEGAL REMEDY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J.
